title: In which group item will be duplicated through API
excerpt:

posts.author: YashGarg (Yash Garg)
posts.cookedHtml:
Can someone please confirm if item duplication through API always create item in same group as base item or not?

One of our customers is saying her duplicate item (through our app) are not going into correct group. We assumed that duplication creates item in the same group but want to confirm whether this is the case or not ?

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
@YashGarg

That is definitely how it is supposed to work. If you find an instance where it is not, I recommend contacting support.

Jim - The Monday Man
